runs.name: tenant-inspections-edit-backend
notes: Enable tenant edits (requiresAction + notes) via PATCH /api/inspections/rooms/:roomId/items
Enforce tenant scope: active lease unit, type MOVE_IN/MOVE_OUT, status != COMPLETED

runs.name: tenant-inspections-edit-frontend
notes: Tenant /tenant/inspections/:id: edit requiresAction + notes, bulk save per room

acceptance: Tenant can edit + save requiresAction and notes on their MOVE_IN/MOVE_OUT inspection
Tenant cannot edit after completion (API denies + UI blocks)
Tenant cannot edit other unit’s inspection or other inspection types
rollback: Remove tenant role from edit routes if needed
